name: code-to-linkedin
description: Create evidence-based LinkedIn profile copy from code and verified Git contributions.

interface.shortDescription: Turn verified code contributions into profile copy.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes scoped repositories and optional Git history, asks targeted career questions, and drafts credible LinkedIn headlines, summaries, experience entries, titles, and skills without inventing impact.
defaultPrompt: Analyze my work and draft my LinkedIn profile.
Turn my Git contributions into experience bullets.
Suggest credible job titles and skills from my code.
